events.event_name: AI在数学证明中的突破
events.core_topic: AI在数学证明中的应用，包括OpenAI解决开放问题和DeepMind批量攻克数学猜想
key_facts: OpenAI解决开放问题
DeepMind批量攻克数学猜想
数学证明被写进形式化系统，交给计算机自动验证
evidence: 输入摘要提到'从OpenAI解决开放问题，到DeepMind批量攻克数学猜想，越来越多数学证明被写进形式化系统，交给计算机自动验证。'
events.why_it_matters: AI在数学证明领域的突破可能加速数学研究，改变数学证明的方式

events.event_name: 浪潮信息强调AI转型中组织文化的重要性
events.core_topic: 浪潮信息高管彭震指出AI转型的最大门槛是人而非技术
key_facts: 彭震用三分之二的时间讲文化、组织和流程
基础设施、算力、芯片不是重点
evidence: 输入摘要提到'彭震没把它们当成重点，却用三分之二的时间在讲文化、组织和流程。'
events.why_it_matters: 该观点挑战了普遍认为技术是AI转型主要障碍的看法，强调组织变革的重要性

events.event_name: 正行创新完成近亿美元天使轮融资
events.core_topic: 具身智能企业正行创新完成近亿美元天使轮系列融资
key_facts: 完成近亿美元天使轮系列融资
投资方包括正大集团、华勤技术、九安医疗等多家上市企业
evidence: 输入摘要提到'正行创新（Striding AI）已完成近亿美元天使轮系列融资。投资方包括正大集团、华勤技术、九安医疗等多家上市企业'
events.why_it_matters: 大额天使轮融资显示市场对具身智能领域的信心

events.event_name: 华人博士Alisa开源OpenAI求职经历
events.core_topic: 华人博士Alisa在入职OpenAI前开源其求职经历
key_facts: Alisa在下周入职OpenAI
她将求职经历以Blog形式开源
evidence: 输入摘要提到'在下周入职OpenAI之前，Alisa决定将自己这一路的求职经历，全部以Blog的形式开源出来'
events.why_it_matters: 为求职者提供宝贵的经验参考

events.event_name: 可口可乐推出AI世界杯互动小程序
events.core_topic: 可口可乐中国小程序利用AI生成世界杯互动角色
key_facts: 可口可乐中国小程序'可口可乐吧'允许用户与范指导互动
范指导有上海口音，热梗张口就来
evidence: 输入摘要提到'打开可口可乐中国小程序'可口可乐吧'，你可以随时跟范指导唠上两句'
events.why_it_matters: 展示AI在营销和用户体验中的创新应用

events.event_name: 英伟达发布机器人操作系统Halos for Robotics
events.core_topic: 英伟达在Automate 2026大会上发布机器人全栈操作系统Halos for Robotics
key_facts: 英伟达在芝加哥Automate 2026大会上发布了 Halos for Robotics
evidence: 原文：刚刚，在芝加哥Automate 2026大会上，英伟达发布了 Halos for Robotics ——
events.why_it_matters: 该操作系统被比喻为'具身版安卓'，可能推动机器人行业的标准化

events.event_name: 特斯拉申请Megapod商标进军AI数据中心硬件
events.core_topic: 特斯拉提交Megapod商标申请，计划销售模块化AI数据中心硬件
key_facts: 特斯拉向美国专利商标局提交了“Megapod”商标申请，计划销售模块化AI数据中心硬件
evidence: 原文：刚刚，特斯拉向美国专利商标局(USPTO)提交了一个名叫 “Megapod” 的商标申请，计划销售模块化AI数据中心硬件。
events.why_it_matters: 特斯拉进军AI基础设施领域，可能加剧市场竞争

events.event_name: 小鹏汽车基于亚马逊云科技搭建AI平台
events.core_topic: 小鹏汽车利用亚马逊云科技服务搭建企业内部AI编程与Agentic工作平台
key_facts: 小鹏基于亚马逊云科技的Kiro、Amazon Bedrock、Amazon EKS等服务搭建了企业内部AI编程与Agentic工作平台“灵犀”
evidence: 原文：小鹏基于亚马逊云科技的 Kiro 、 Amazon Bedrock 、 Amazon EKS 等服务，搭了一套企业内部AI编程与Agentic工作平台，名字叫 灵犀 。
events.why_it_matters: 展示云计算服务在企业AI转型中的关键作用

events.event_name: 豆包2.1模型发布
events.core_topic: 豆包2.1发布，包含Pro和Turbo两个模型，API服务上线火山方舟
key_facts: 豆包2.1发布，包含两个模型：Doubao-Seed-2.1-Pro和Doubao-Seed-2.1-Turbo，API服务已全量上线火山方舟
evidence: 原文：这个版本一共包含2个模型，分别是Doubao-Seed-2.1-Pro和Doubao-Seed-2.1-Turbo，并且API服务已全量上线火山方舟。
events.why_it_matters: 新模型可能提升AI Agent能力，尤其在芯片设计等复杂任务中

events.event_name: 2026年具身智能融资火热
events.core_topic: 2026年具身智能领域融资超过去年全年，资金主要流向机器人'大脑'技术
key_facts: 2026年具身智能融资超过去年全年，超过一半的钱流入机器人的“大脑”
evidence: 原文：2026年还没过半，具身智能的融资就快要超过去年全年了，超过一半的钱都流入了机器人的“大脑”。
events.why_it_matters: 反映具身智能领域的投资热潮和技术发展方向

events.event_name: GPT-5帮助解决免疫学谜题
events.core_topic: GPT-5 Pro帮助免疫学家解决了一个持续3年的免疫学谜题
key_facts: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery
offered insights into T cell behavior
breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research
evidence: The summary states: 'GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.'
events.why_it_matters: 展示AI在医学研究中的潜力，可能加速癌症和自身免疫疾病研究

events.event_name: Omio利用OpenAI构建对话式旅行体验
events.core_topic: 旅行平台Omio利用OpenAI技术构建对话式旅行体验并转型为AI原生公司
key_facts: Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences
accelerates product development
transforming into an AI-native company
evidence: The summary states: 'Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.'
events.why_it_matters: 展示AI在旅行行业的应用，推动行业数字化转型

events.event_name: AutoDex: 自动化灵巧抓取数据收集系统
events.core_topic: AutoDex系统实现自动化真实世界灵巧抓取数据收集，效率提升4.8倍
key_facts: AutoDex is an automated real-world data-collection system for dexterous grasping
collects 3,593 grasp trials across Allegro and Inspire hands on 100 diverse objects
4.8x throughput improvement over teleoperation
grasps from AutoDex-validated database succeed 76% vs 34% for simulation-only validation
evidence: The abstract states: 'AutoDex, an automated real-world data-collection system... collects 3,593 grasp trials... 4.8x throughput improvement... grasps retrieved from the AutoDex-validated database succeed 76% versus 34% for simulation-only validation.'
events.why_it_matters: 解决灵巧抓取中真实数据收集的瓶颈，推动机器人学习

events.event_name: Randomized YaRN改进长上下文推理
events.core_topic: Randomized YaRN方法通过随机位置编码和长度课程提升LLM长上下文推理能力
key_facts: Randomized YaRN combines YaRN-based positional extrapolation with randomized positional encoding and a length curriculum
evaluated on BABILong and Multi-Round Coreference Resolution
improves reasoning performance on context lengths from 16K to 128K when trained on <8K context
outperforms standard fine-tuning
evidence: The abstract states: 'Randomized YaRN... improves reasoning performance on context lengths from 16K to 128K and outperforms standard fine-tuning.'
events.why_it_matters: 解决LLM长上下文泛化难题，提升实际应用能力

events.event_name: CoorDex: 连续灵巧人形机器人操作
events.core_topic: CoorDex学习管线实现人形机器人在移动中的灵巧操作
key_facts: CoorDex enables high-DoF dexterous loco-manipulation on the move
uses a Unitree G1 humanoid with a 20-DoF WUJI hand
demonstrates non-stop bottle grasping and carrying, fridge door opening on the move, and cube pick-and-turn
joint-space PPO, joint-space hand control, and monolithic latent prediction all fail under the same reward budget
evidence: The abstract states: 'CoorDex enables a Unitree G1 humanoid with a 20-DoF WUJI hand to execute dexterous manipulation while in motion... joint-space PPO, joint-space hand control, and monolithic latent prediction all fail under the same reward budget.'
events.why_it_matters: 突破人形机器人移动中灵巧操作的技术瓶颈

events.event_name: Semantic Browsing: 可控多样性的图像生成
events.core_topic: 提出Semantic Browsing方法，通过文本级语义控制实现图像生成的可控多样性
key_facts: Modern text-to-image models excel in visual fidelity and prompt adherence.
evidence: The paper introduces a method for controlled diversity that enables Semantic Browsing, where users can navigate structured image galleries and experience creative exploration.
events.why_it_matters: 提升图像生成的可控性和创造性，改善用户体验

events.event_name: AIR: 自适应交错推理与代码增强
events.core_topic: 通过强化学习训练多模态大模型实现自适应交错推理能力
key_facts: Following the paradigm shift initiated by OpenAI o3, interleaved reasoning with code to enhance multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has become a pivotal research frontier.
evidence: The paper empowers MLLMs with adaptive interleaved reasoning capabilities through extended reinforcement learning training on code-augmented complex numerical computation tasks.
events.why_it_matters: 提升多模态大模型在复杂数值计算任务中的推理能力

events.event_name: AdamW在重尾噪声下的有效性开放问题
events.core_topic: 提出AdamW优化器在重尾噪声下是否有效的开放问题
key_facts: AdamW is the de facto optimizer for training large language models (LLMs), yet the theory behind it still lives mostly in finite-variance regimes.
evidence: The paper formulates an open problem about AdamW's convergence under heavy-tailed noise, stating that no rigorous convergence theory for AdamW has yet been established in this regime.
events.why_it_matters: 挑战现有优化器理论，推动LLM训练理论发展

events.event_name: PsyBridge: 多维度心理健康评估框架
events.core_topic: 提出PsyBridge混合智能框架，整合临床工具、认知评估和人格画像进行多维度心理健康评估
key_facts: Mental health assessment commonly relies on isolated screening instruments or data-driven models that often lack interpretability and multi-dimensional integration.
evidence: The study proposes PsyBridge, a hybrid intelligent decision-support framework for multi-dimensional mental health assessment, achieving an overall accuracy of 0.84.
events.why_it_matters: 提供可解释、可扩展的心理健康评估工具，适用于数字医疗

events.event_name: NVIDIA Nemotron挑战赛中的位操作谜题解法
events.core_topic: 提出基于字符串相似性和回溯搜索的方法解决位操作谜题，在NVIDIA Nemotron挑战赛中取得96%验证准确率
key_facts: This paper presents our algorithmic innovations for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge, focusing on Bit Manipulation Puzzles.
evidence: The paper presents algorithmic innovations for the NVIDIA Nemotron Model Reasoning Challenge, achieving over 96% validation accuracy on bit manipulation puzzles.
events.why_it_matters: 提升LLM在逻辑推理和位操作任务中的表现
